message:
fix: replace fsnotify watcher with polling in watchIssues (bd-87xv)

Dolt stores data in a server-side database, not files — fsnotify
watchers never fire. Replace with 2s polling that compares issue
snapshots (ID + status + updated_at). Also fixes signal handler leak
(defer signal.Stop) and debounce timer race condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/shale
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
